prose: Pyridine HOMO–LUMO gap computed via DFT (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, tier standard, density-fit, PySCF) in gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied fixed coordinates. SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO = −7.2526 eV, LUMO = −1.1128 eV, gap = 6.1398 eV. These are Koopmans-regime orbital-energy differences, not excitation or ionization energies. Calculation command: `frontier --method dft --functional b3lyp --basis def2-tzvp --tier standard pyridine.xyz`. Integrity check: ok, trustworthy. No warnings reported.
